nl_query: Which evaluators are currently in the pool for active boards but have no active script assignments, and show their faculty name, department, and the boards they are eligible for.
failed_sql: SELECT ep.employee_id, fc.name, ep.eligible_role, ep.is_available, au.display_name, au.employee_id, au.faculty_unit_id, au.faculty_unit_name, b.name AS board_name FROM evaluator_pool ep JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = ep.employee_id JOIN app_user au ON au.employee_id = ep.employee_id JOIN board b ON b.id = ep.board_id WHERE ep.is_available = TRUE AND ep.board_id IN (SELECT board_id FROM board WHERE status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM script_assignment sa WHERE sa.evaluator_id = ep.employee_id AND sa.is_active = TRUE)
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.faculty_unit_id, app_user.faculty_unit_name, board.name. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
